_comment: Campaign scaling & mechanics config. Tweak these for difficulty, pacing, loot balance.

scaling._comment_soul: Base souls per encounter. Adjusted by CR/level dynamically.

mechanics._comment_turn: Encounter ends in X turns if undecided. Forces decisive play.
mechanics._comment_frost: Frostbite exhaustion at 3 stacks. Use for Outrider/Vordt.
mechanics._comment_kindle: Temp HP from Kindle. Flat +10, or adjust for party size.
mechanics._comment_critical: Teaching deaths occur at this damage threshold. 0 = instant, 5 = at -5 HP.

pacing._comment_encounter: Total main encounters. 8 for one-shot, adjust for campaign.
pacing._comment_rest: short = between encounters, long = hub only. Affects attrition.

theme_colors._comment_primary: DS3 dark grey. Swap for campaign theme (e.g. '#e6d5c3' for light temple).
